case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS NATIONAL BANK VS. DAVID ROJA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-17-2025 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-07-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
